zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston於大約1502年1月11日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，他的父親Sir William Preston39歲，母親Anne Burnell27歲。他於1526年與Catherine Fitzgerald在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年2月15日在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston于大约1502年1月11日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，他的父亲Sir William Preston39岁，母亲Anne Burnell27岁。他于1526年与Catherine Fitzgerald在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年2月15日在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Jenico
meanings: Found as a baptismal name. Doubtless a male name, and derived from Jericho, the well-known city in Palestine.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston was born about 11 January 1502, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir William Preston, was 39 and his mother, Anne Burnell, was 27. He married Catherine Fitzgerald in 1526, in County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 15 February 1560, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston est né environ 11 janvier 1502, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir William Preston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Anne Burnell, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Fitzgerald en 1526, à County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 15 février 1560, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston um 11. Januar 1502 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Preston 39 und seine Mutter Anne Burnell 27. Er hat 1526 in County Kildare, Irland Catherine Fitzgerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1560 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston è nato il circa 11 gennaio 1502 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir William Preston, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Anne Burnell, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Fitzgerald nel 1526, nel County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 febbraio 1560, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanstonが約1502年1月11日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Prestonは39歳，母Anne Burnellは27歳であった。1526年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアでCatherine Fitzgeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年2月15日に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston(이)가 대략 1502년 1월 11일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Preston(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Burnell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1526년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 Catherine Fitzgerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 2월 15일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Abt. 11 Jan 1502–15 February 1560: aproximadamente 11 de janeiro de 1502–15 de fevereiro de 1560
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston nasceu aproximadamente 11 de janeiro de 1502, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir William Preston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Anne Burnell, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Fitzgerald em 1526, em County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1560, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston родился около 11 января 1502 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Preston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Burnell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Fitzgerald в 1526 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 15 февраля 1560 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

sm.Abt. 11 Jan 1502–15 February 1560: e tusa o le 11 Ianuari 1502–15 Fepuari 1560

es.Abt. 11 Jan 1502–15 February 1560: aproximadamente 11 de enero de 1502–15 de febrero de 1560
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston nació aproximadamente 11 de enero de 1502, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir William Preston, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Anne Burnell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Catherine Fitzgerald en 1526, en County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1560, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
